_schema_notes: Cached geocoding results for the Map view (Leaflet + OpenStreetMap, added 2026-07-12). Keyed by the EXACT venue string as it appears in dance_events.json -- app.js looks up an event's venue text here first. Geocoded once via OpenStreetMap's free Nominatim service (never per-visitor -- that would violate their usage policy) and cached here so the map never makes a live geocoding call. 'precision': 'exact' means Nominatim resolved the specific address; 'city' means the specific venue/address wasn't found in OpenStreetMap's data (common for small local halls) and this falls back to the city center instead -- an honest approximate pin rather than an invented precise one. 'city_fallbacks' is used by app.js automatically for any venue NOT listed here at all (derived from the same Pensacola/Mobile/Panama City Beach text-matching locationOf() already uses for the Location filter) so a brand-new venue still gets at least a city-level pin without needing this file updated first. To improve a 'city' precision entry later: add the venue to OpenStreetMap (anyone can edit, free) and re-geocode, or ask Sean for a manual lat/lon from Google Maps and hardcode it here.
